NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
Categories

Categories available in the course

None.

 string

 string

None.

 string

None.

 string

None.
ExtraUserInformation

 string

None.
Groups

The course groups defined in the course

 Collection of Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.AssessmentRecord.AssessmentRecordGroup

None.
HasExistingAssessment

Checks if there is any available existing assessments to add to gradebook

 boolean

None.
IsAccessibilityModeEnabled

Checks if accessibility mode is enabled

 boolean

None.
IsAssessmentRecordEnabledForCourse

Checks if the assessment record is enabled for course

 boolean

None.
IsAssessmentRecordSettingsLinkVisible

Checks if assessment record settings link is visible

 boolean

None.
IsAverageAndCountEnabled

Checks if the average and count tab is enabled for course

 boolean

None.
IsCategoryWeightingEnabled

Checks if the categories weighting is enabled

 boolean

None.
IsExemptEnabled

Checks if the exempt is enabled for the site

 boolean

None.
IsSummaryEnabled

Checks if assessment record summary is enabled

 boolean

None.
IsTransferToExternalSystemEnabled

Checks if exportGradebook is enabled and exportAPI is configured

 boolean

None.

None.

 string
